    "Auxiliary heat is locked on continuously",
    "Thermostat sequencer or relay contacts are welded shut",
    "Incorrect thermostat wiring or shorted W/W2 control wire"
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Isolate power to the indoor unit and thermostat",
    "Check for 24V AC on the W/W2 terminal at the air handler with thermostat disconnected",
    "Inspect and replace the faulty sequencer, relay, or thermostat if contacts are welded or shorted"
  ],
  "rationale": "The auxiliary heat is locked on, which typically indicates a mechanical failure of the sequencer/relay contacts (welded shut), a short circuit in the low-voltage thermostat wiring (specifically the W/W2 call line), or a failed thermostat internal switch. This causes continuous energy consumption and potential overheating.",

    "Manufacturer wiring diagrams and sequence of operations",
    "NEC Class 2 Control Circuits"
  ]
